tasks.title: Fail-closed prediction gate: commit plan_hash prediction before poll; GatedProposal default-deny; analysis-only records without gating

scenarios: A prediction is committed before the approval poll starts
A proposal with no committed prediction is denied
An approval poll cannot be built without a gated prediction
Analysis-only mode records the prediction without gating the approval

tasks.title: Deterministic verifier: sole writer of the match/partial/deviation verdict; deviation never auto-resolves

scenarios: The mechanical verdict is written only by the deterministic verifier
The acting model has no write path to the verdict columns
The verifier returns a typed verdict detail whose enum matches the bare verdict

tasks.title: ActionManifest content-hash binding threaded through predict/approve/execute/verify

scenarios: The action_id is threaded unchanged through predict approve execute and verify
A mid-session action change mints a new action_id and forces a re-gate

tasks.title: Single ParseProposal -> typed Proposal (one grammar; unparseable/second-grammar fails closed, closing H-02)

scenarios: The sole ParseProposal entry point rejects every second grammar
